abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: Cybersecurity Innovation Hub (CIH) is the only European Digital Innovation Hub (EDIH) in the Czech Republic and one of the very few in Central Europe that focuses on Cybersecurity and Trust as the Specific Objective 3 within Digital Europe (DEP).
